title: Reflection of Sound
description: Diagram illustrating the reflection of sound waves, showing incident wave, normal, and reflected wave.

title: Compression and Rarefaction
description: Visual representation of how sound waves propagate as longitudinal waves through compressions and rarefactions of particles in a medium.

title: Vibration of a Rubber Band
description: Example showing how stretching and plucking a rubber band creates rapid to-and-fro vibrations, which produce sound.

title: School Bell Vibration
description: A school bell functioning, where a hammer strikes a gong, causing it to vibrate and create sound waves.

title: Musical Instruments Vibration Chart
description: A chart listing various musical instruments (like guitar, flute, drum) and explaining which vibrating part produces sound for each.

title: Human Vocal Cords
description: Diagram of human vocal cords in the larynx, illustrating how the vibration of vocal cords produces the human voice.
